name: Wallace Golf Shop
about: Wallace Golf Shop is a comprehensive golf facility offering club fitting, instruction, and an indoor golf simulator experience. Located at the practice tee of Chambersburg Country Club, the venue features a climate-controlled 780 sq. ft. simulator room powered by Trackman technology with over 250 available golf courses. The business, operated by Wallace Golf, LLC, has been recognized multiple times by the Association of Golf Merchandisers for excellence in retail. Services include certified custom club fitting, golf lessons from multiple coaches, and simulator rentals for practice or virtual play.
why_golfers_like_it: Professional-grade Trackman technology for accurate ball and club tracking
Comprehensive fitting services with multiple certified custom fitters
Flexible simulator hours with special arrangements available
Access to a wide variety of virtual golf courses and training environments
Reputable golf shop recognized for retail excellence

food_and_drink.notes: No information on food service available
No information on alcohol service available

simulator_hardware.notes: Climate-controlled simulator room at Chambersburg Country Club practice tee

faq.question: Do I need my own golf clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you can use your own golf clubs. Trackman uses radar technology to capture ball flight, so there's no need for stickers, dots, or anything attached to your clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: No information is provided on outside food or drink policies. Please contact the facility directly for details.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: No specific information about the time required to play 18 holes is available. Simulator rental time should be confirmed directly with the facility.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: No specific information about child-friendly features or policies is provided. The facility offers junior and youth coaching services, but general family amenities are not mentioned.
